_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in conducting queries and developing algorithms to analyze data structures.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in translating a business question into a data query, identifying the correct data sources, joins, filters, and aggregations required to answer the question accurately.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.585), TF-S-010 (TF, cosine: 0.584).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.9/10 (raw 0.692). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [algorithms, analyze, conducting, developing, queries, structures] vs WIDAI-only terms [accurately, aggregations, answer, business, correct, filters] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.895 (P=0.914, R=0.877). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in conducting queries and developing algorithms to analyze data structures" and "Skill in translating a business question into a data query, identifying the corr" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.599 < STS 0.692 (gap -0.093). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [algorithms, analyze, conducting] and [accurately, aggregations, answer] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.5%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [algorithms, analyze, conducting, developing, queries, structures]. WIDAI-only: [accurately, aggregations, answer, business, correct, filters].
